Appearances:
Thomas LaLanne for Eric Francois, et al.
Sheila Robello for and with Carol Francois.

The parties confirmed that they were ready for trial. Mr. LaLanne indicated a trial time of three or four days. The matter is set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on January 26, 2020 at 9:30 a.m., (order signed in open court and copies of the Order Setting Trial In The Department Of The Presiding Judge And Notice Of Trial were provided to Counsel by the clerk).
